title: Expansion and Contraction of the Patagonian Ice Sheet and Its Influence on Magma Storage Beneath Mocho‐Choshuenco Volcano, Chile
venue: Journal of Geophysical Research: Solid Earth
justification: Growth and retreat of the PIS during the last 60 ka is simulated using the Ice Sheet and Sea‐level System Model (ISSM, Larour et al., 2012 ) across the Chilean Lake District, expanding the time frame of the model in Cuzzone et al. ( 2024 ).
